ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date_and_time_of_initial_call" TEXT /* Date and time of the initial call */,
  "date_and_time_of_ranger_response" TEXT /* Date and time of the ranger response */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the incident occurred */,
  "property" TEXT /* Property where the incident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species involved */,
  "call_source" TEXT /* Source of the call */,
  "species_status" TEXT /* Status of the species (e.g., Domestic, Exotic, Native) */,
  "animal_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the animal (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  "duration_of_response" REAL /* Duration of the response */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the animal (e.g., Juvenile, Adult) */,
  "animal_class" TEXT /* Class of the animal (e.g., Birds, Mammals) */,
  "311sr_number" TEXT /* 311 SR number */,
  "final_ranger_action" TEXT /* Final action taken by the ranger */,
  "num_of_animals" INTEGER /* Number of animals involved */,
  "pep_response" INTEGER /* Whether a PEP response was required */,
  "animal_monitored" INTEGER /* Whether the animal was monitored */,
  "rehabilitator" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitator */,
  "hours_spent_monitoring" REAL /* Hours spent monitoring the animal */,
  "police_response" INTEGER /* Whether a police response was required */,
  "esu_response" INTEGER /* Whether an ESU response was required */,
  "acc_intake_number" INTEGER /* ACC intake number */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the incident */,
  "ranger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranger who handled the incident */,
  "rehabilitator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rehabilitator involved */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian involved */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the incident */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if a follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date and time for the follow-up action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_species_description FOREIGN KEY ("species_description") REFERENCES species ("species_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_borough FOREIGN KEY ("borough") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_veterinarian_id FOREIGN KEY ("veterinarian_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("vet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_property FOREIGN KEY ("property") REFERENCES properties ("property_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_rehabilitator_id FOREIGN KEY ("rehabilitator_id") REFERENCES rehabilitators ("rehabilitator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ranger_id FOREIGN KEY ("ranger_id") REFERENCES rangers ("ranger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "species_status" TEXT /* Status of the species (e.g., Domestic, Exotic, Native) */,
  "species_class" TEXT /* Class of the species (e.g., Birds, Mammals) */,
  "species_lifespan" REAL /* Average lifespan of the species */,
  "species_diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "species_habitat" TEXT /* Natural habitat of the species */,
  "species_endangered_status" TEXT /* Endangered status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "borough_area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "borough_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the borough's animal control department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Borough where the property is located */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Residential, Commercial, Park) */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square meters */,
  "property_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership of the property (e.g., Private, Public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Property where the location is located */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the location */,
  "location_environment" TEXT /* Environment of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rangers" (
  "ranger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranger */,
  "ranger_name" TEXT /* Name of the ranger */,
  "ranger_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the ranger */,
  "ranger_department" TEXT /* Department the ranger belongs to */,
  "ranger_experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the ranger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitators" (
  "rehabilitator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitator */,
  "rehabilitator_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitator */,
  "rehabilitator_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the rehabilitator */,
  "rehabilitator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the rehabilitator */,
  "rehabilitator_experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the rehabilitator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rehabilitator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acc_intakes" (
  "acc_intake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ACC intake */,
  "acc_intake_number" INTEGER /* ACC intake number */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Incident ID associated with the ACC intake */,
  "intake_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the ACC intake */,
  "intake_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the animal at the time of intake */,
  "intake_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided to the animal during intake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acc_intake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acc_intakes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "vet_name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian */,
  "vet_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the veterinarian */,
  "vet_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the veterinarian */,
  "vet_experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the veterinarian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vet_id")
)
